claim: Evidence agent results with missing, clarify, block, or failed status create PRD readiness blockers via recommendation and missing field checks.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function checks missing array and recommendation/verdict/status fields to generate blockers.
evidence.why: Core implementation converting evidence agent results to PRD readiness blockers.

evidence.summary: If result.missing.length is truthy, creates EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker with role and missing items.
evidence.why: Missing evidence field directly generates blockers preventing PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: If recommendation is clarify/blocked/block OR verdict is blocked/block/fail/failed OR status is blocked/failed/error, creates EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED blocker.
evidence.why: Clarify, block, and failed recommendations convert to blockers against PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness iterates required evidence agents, checks for complete results, and calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each.
evidence.why: Integration point: evidence blockers are aggregated into final blockers array.

evidence.summary: prd_ready computed as blockers.length === 0, meaning any blocker prevents PRD readiness.
evidence.why: Final gate controlling PRD readiness status.

evidence.summary: Test verifies missing required evidence agent results create EVIDENCE_AGENT_RESULT_REQUIRED blockers and prd_ready false.
evidence.why: Test proves missing agent results block PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: Test verifies evidence conflicts and block recommendations create EVIDENCE_AGENT_CONFLICT blockers and prd_ready false.
evidence.why: Test proves block recommendations prevent PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: Test verifies missing field and clarify recommendations create EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blockers with prd_ready false.
evidence.why: Test proves missing and clarify become blockers.

risks: Evidence path references are valid and files exist at specified locations.
Blocker generation logic correctly handles all edge cases in evidence agent results.
Test coverage adequately reflects production behavior.

result.notes: Verified: Explorer and cross-checker evidence is consistent, cross-checked, and supported by project code and tests. All evidence paths are valid project-scoped sources. No assumptions presented as facts. Cross-checker correction about prd_ready computation line (750 vs 738) is accurate but does not change the claim validity. Missing and clarify recommendations are confirmed to create blockers that prevent prd_ready from becoming true. Evidence is sufficient to support PRD readiness determination.
